info.name: Cosmic Daily — Vedika Astrology API (Sandbox)
info.description: GET and POST requests used to test the Vedika Astrology API sandbox before building the Cosmic Daily website. No API key required — sandbox mode.

request.description: Returns today's mock horoscope reading for the given zodiac sign (prediction, rating, lucky number/color/time, moon phase).
Creates a mock birth chart (ascendant sign, nakshatra, traits, SVG chart) from the given birth date/time and coordinates.
